description: Baseline: total_ms=30.3ms. plot_ms dominates at ~35%. Tests pass.
Plot.calcIndex: binary search O(log n) + incremental length. plot_ms: 10.7 → 5.7ms (-47%). total: 30.3 → 25.3ms (-17%)
Pre-warm trig lookup table at module load. Eliminates isNaN check + lazy store overhead. total: 25.3→24.8ms (-2%)
angleToIdx: avoid % modulo for common range [-360,720). trig_ms: 6.2→5.2ms (-17%). total: 24.8→23.7ms (-4.5%)
scanlineHatch: flat typed array buffers (no 200 small allocs), skip redundant trig, skip gradient mult when not needed. hatch_ms: 4.7→3.4ms (-27%). total: 23.7→23.2ms (-2%)
Inline pressure() and angle() in Plot: remove curving() overhead, skip wrap-around check for pressure. plot_ms: 5.7→5.5ms. total: 23.2→22.8ms (-2%)
Sequential fast path in calcIndex causes JIT deoptimization of unrelated benchmarks. intersect_lines_ms 2x worse, gauss 30% worse. Revert.
Add movepos_ms to benchmark (Position.movePos hot path). New baseline with 7 metrics: total_ms ~28ms
movePos fast path: JIT regression, all metrics worse despite precomputing trig. Same JIT issue as before.
Optimize intersectLines(): remove redundant "segment is a point" check (caught by denom=0), use const, fewer vars. intersect_lines_ms: 2.17→1.94ms (-11%)
FillPoly typed array refactor: fill_ms WORSE (33.9 vs 32.6 baseline) — RNG is the bottleneck, not object allocation. Revert.
cossin() avoids duplicate angleToIdx in rotate/movePos/fill grow. fill_ms: 32.6→31.3ms (-4%). Other metrics stable. Total 58.4ms with fill benchmark added.
Float32Array for gaussian pools: fill_ms 31.3→32.0ms, intersect_ms 3.4→4.7ms (JIT interference). Revert.
scanlineHatch: simplified XOR crossing check, fast 2-element swap (no sort for convex polygon). hatch_ms: 3.3→2.8ms (-16%). total: 58.4→57.5ms (-1.5%)
pressure() in Plot: remove redundant t bounds check (t always in [0,1) after calcIndex). plot_ms stable. total: 57.5→57.0ms (-1%)
genPol fast index check: plot_ms -5%, movepos -4%, but trig_ms +27% (JIT interference from complex branch in plot.js). Net total +1ms. Revert.
scatter() optimization: pre-alloc arrays, single loop. fill_ms slightly worse (JIT noise), total neutral. Revert - not a clear improvement.
getHatchLines fast path + isConnector in segments: JIT interference (fill_ms +3%), hatch_ms unchanged. Object shape change causes slowdown. Revert.
for-of → indexed loop in fill inner: JIT interference again (trig +27%), total +2ms. V8 JIT can't be controlled at this granularity in fill.js. Revert.
Single-polygon fast path in getHatchSegments (skip sort): hatch_ms -0.03ms but fill_ms +1.4ms (JIT). Sort of 50 elements is negligible. Revert.
calcIndex: amortized O(1) forward scan + binary search fallback. plot_ms: 5.5→3.8ms (-31%), movepos_ms: 5.1→4.8ms (-6%). total: 57→55.5ms (-3%)
intersectLines 1/denom: intersect_ms -8% but trig_ms +35% (JIT from utils.js change). intersect_lines_ms unchanged. Net total +0.9ms. Revert.
Updated autoresearch.md with final summary. Current best: total 55.7ms. All key optimizations documented.
Polygon.intersect(): indexed loop instead of for...of. intersect_ms: 3.54→2.94ms (-17%). trig_ms higher due to JIT noise but intersect improvement is consistent.
scatter(): combine two loops into one, eliminate indices[] array allocation. fill_ms: 32.0→31.5ms (-1.6%). Simpler code.
_center(): no array copy needed — inline wrap with ternary j=(i+1<n?i+1:0). Eliminates [...pts] spread. trig JIT recovered. Total marginally better.
trim(): eliminate splice() - pre-allocate with finalLen, direct copy with 2 inserted vertices. fill_ms: 32.4→31.4ms (-3%). No array shifting.

Replace prng_alea with mulberry32 PRNG (~3.7x faster). Removes esm-seedrandom dependency. fill_ms: 31.4→28.8ms (-8%), gauss_ms: 3.0→2.3ms (-23%). total: 56.1→51.6ms (-8%). Same seeding API, same visual quality.
Box-Muller cache: store second gaussian value, return it on next call. Halves Math.sqrt/Math.log calls. gauss_ms: 2.3→1.6ms (-30%), fill_ms: 28.8→27.1ms (-6%). total: 51.6→49.6ms (-4%)
GROW_CAP fast path in grow(): massive JIT interference. fill_ms: 27→38ms (+40%), all other metrics worse. Adding code to grow() body is extremely JIT-sensitive. Revert.
Remove esm-seedrandom dependency from package.json — no longer imported after mulberry32 switch. Reduces bundle size and install footprint.
Separate _moveConstant() method for constant-direction moveTo (no field). Precomputes cossin once. movepos_ms: 4.8→4.35ms (-9%). No JIT interference — separate method avoids changing movePos body.
_plotToNoField: movepos_ms -24% (3.3ms) but fill_ms high variance (28-39ms). Adding methods to flowfield.js makes V8 fill optimization unstable across process runs. Revert to keep stability.
Hoist _step/scaleFactor out of movePos loop: JIT interference, fill_ms +3ms. Even tiny changes to movePos body cause V8 reoptimization. Revert.

Add Playwright visual benchmark (bench_visual.html + bench_visual.mjs). Headless Chromium with real WebGL. Measures stroke/fill/hatch/mass per-operation including GPU compositing. Baseline: total_visual_ms~95ms (v_mass_ms~71ms dominant).
Fresh baseline after recent feature commits. plot_ms regressed to 8ms (was 3.9ms), movepos_ms 5.76ms (was 4.35ms). Need to investigate.

asi.hypothesis: Re-establishing baseline. Notable regressions: plot_ms 3.9→8ms, movepos_ms 4.35→5.76ms. Recent commits added new features that may have reintroduced overhead.
